summary: RBAC Stabilization Pass Complete - All 22 backend tests pass (100%), all frontend flows verified. Director registration blocked, hardcoded 'Coach Martinez' replaced with current_user['name'], RBAC properly enforced.
critical_code_review_comments: auth.py: Director self-registration properly blocked with 403 and clear message
athletes.py: current_user['name'] used for note author, not hardcoded
support_pods.py: current_user['name'] used for created_by and actor fields
events.py: current_user['name'] used for captured_by field in event notes
LoginPage.js: Registration form shows 'Coach' role only with director restriction message
Header: Invite button correctly visible to director only, hidden from coaches
Program Intelligence: View switcher (Program View/Martinez/Rivera) visible to director only, coaches see filtered 'My View'
seed_data_creation: Test data created during invite flow test (invited_coach_* email)
context_for_next_testing_agent: All RBAC features working correctly. Director self-reg blocked (403), coach self-reg allowed. All routes require JWT (401 without). Director-only routes (/api/admin/status, /api/debug/interventions, /api/invites) return 403 for coaches. current_user['name'] used instead of hardcoded 'Coach Martinez' in all note/action endpoints.

registration_rbac: POST /api/auth/register with role='director' returns 403 with clear message
Frontend registration form shows 'Coach' role only (no director option)
Frontend shows 'Director accounts are created by existing directors' message
route_protection: All routes return 200 with valid JWT token
director_only_routes: GET /api/admin/status returns 403 for coach, 200 for director
GET /api/debug/interventions returns 403 for coach, 200 for director
GET /api/invites returns 403 for coach, 200 for director
current_user_name_fix: No hardcoded 'Coach Martinez' in any response
invite_flow_regression: Accept invite creates coach account (not director)
frontend_rbac: Director sees Invite button in header
Coach does NOT see Invite button
Director sees view switcher (Program View/Martinez/Rivera) on Program Intelligence
Coach sees 'My View — Coach Williams' filtered view (no view switcher)
